item.title: House GOP Probes Michigan Noncitizens in Jury Pool, Voter Roll
item.description: House Republicans opened a federal inquiry Tuesday into reports that noncitizens appeared in a Michigan jury pool and, in some cases, were registered ...

item.title: FBI Search of Ga. Offices Tied to Probe of Possible 2020 Election 'Defects,' Affidavit Says
item.description: The FBI obtained a search warrant to seize hundreds of boxes of ballots from election offices in Fulton County, Georgia, as part of a criminal investi...

item.title: GOP Fundraising Lead Over Dems Widens Ahead of Midterms
item.description: Democrats are warning that a financial advantage they enjoyed for much of the Trump era is fading, with FEC filings showing Republicans and allied out...

item.title: Telecom Execs Defend Turning Over Lawmakers' Data to Biden DOJ
